ops.title: Editor's Desk overhaul — deferred polish & verification follow-ups
ops.description:
The 2026-07-21 "Editor's Desk" UI overhaul (web phases A–E: c8c985bf, 55b2e195, 51e6e647, 6581ccad; iOS phases F–I: c5c541cf, f5e5eb69) shipped green with these items deliberately deferred. Each was found by a verification lane and accepted as out-of-scope at the time; none blocks the shipped experience.

1. **Rail empty on non-conversation blocks** (web): the cursor ring includes input/draft/triage/pack blocks but `threadFeed` pins only approval/choice, so a cursor landing elsewhere empties the rail's pinned slot. Decide: rail empty-state vs extending threadFeed. (Found by the j/k fix lane; doesn't manifest on all-choice/approval boards.)
2. **Empty CommentChip → two clicks to compose** (web): the chip pins+opens the panel per spec, but composing the first note needs a second click on the rail's Add feedback. Consider routing empty blocks straight to requestCompose(). (D refuter, matches-spec note.)
3. **Selected option card's control glyph doesn't fill** (web): border+wash carry the selected state but the radio/checkbox indicator stays empty. (QA round 2 side-note.)
4. **iOS comments feed excludes closed-round history** — web's threadFeed includes recorded rounds; iOS scoped to the live doc. Decide parity or documented platform difference. (Phase H deviation flag.)
5. **Stale doc comment**: ios/CcPresent/Blocks/TriageBlockView.swift ~:205 references the deleted FactsCluster type. (iOS G+H+I verify, cosmetic.)
6. **Pack-block visual pass never ran**: the dev daemon rejects examples/packs/example over a host_api 2-vs-1 skew (daemon-side, predates the overhaul). Fix the skew, then verify pack blocks render with the new resolved tokens (web + the iOS theme-parity embed check).
7. **iOS live-board visual sweep outstanding**: F–I shipped on build+tests+static seams; board views (carousel snap/dots/VoiceOver position, comments-sheet composer holding the 450ms auto-advance, wizard bar) were unreachable in the sim without daemon pairing and with UI-interaction MCP tools disabled. Run the full dark/light sweep when reachable; also consider equal-height carousel cards (G left natural-height deliberately).

ops.text: Rail non-conversation-block behavior decided and implemented (empty-state or threadFeed extension)
Empty-chip compose routing decided (one-click compose or documented as-is)
Selected option card indicator fills in both themes
iOS feed history-parity decision recorded (parity or platform difference note)
Pack host_api skew fixed and pack render verified on the new tokens (web + iOS embed)
iOS live-board visual sweep completed dark+light (carousel, sheet composer hold, wizard bar)
